positive: Minimalist celestial cityscape viewed through a geometric window frame. The scene features stylized, low-poly mountains transitioning into a nebula-filled sky at twilight. A crescent moon hangs above intricate architectural spires with sharp, modern angles. Use a deep indigo and sapphire color palette, accented by glowing copper and pearl white neon lines. The style must be highly detailed vector art combined with vaporwave aesthetic, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong geometric contrast. Central composition, perfect for repeat pattern printing on apparel. Dramatic volumetric lighting casting sharp shadows.
